  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Regresiones


library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(WDI)
library(countrycode)
library(purrr)
library(fixest)
library(zoo)
library(pracma)

# -----------------------------
# Load base
# -----------------------------
df <- read_csv("base_final.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(substr(year_month, 1, 4)),
    country = toupper(country)
  )

countries_needed <- sort(unique(df$country))

# -----------------------------
# World Bank 
# -----------------------------

wb_indicators <- c(
  internet       = "IT.NET.USER.ZS")


wb_list <- purrr::imap(wb_indicators, function(code, name) {
  WDI(country = countries_needed, indicator = code) %>%
    transmute(
      country = toupper(iso2c),
      year,
      !!name := .data[[code]]
    )
})

wb <- purrr::reduce(wb_list, full_join, by = c("country", "year"))


# -----------------------------
# SWIID (names -> ISO2)
# -----------------------------
swiid <- read_csv("swiid.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    country = toupper(countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso2c"))
  ) %>%
  filter(country %in% countries_needed) %>%
  transmute(country, year, gini_disp, gini_mkt)

# -----------------------------
# Merge
# -----------------------------
df2 <- df %>%
  left_join(wb, by = c("country", "year")) %>%
  left_join(swiid, by = c("country", "year"))

There are two approaches, one with country-year specific effects and other with yearly control data on gdp, inequality and internet acces.

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(pracma)

vars_annual <- c("internet", "gini_disp", "gini_mkt")

df_monthly <- df2 %>%
  mutate(
    ym = as.Date(paste0(year_month, "-01")),
    t = as.numeric(ym),
    month = as.integer(substr(year_month, 6, 7))
  ) %>%
  arrange(country, ym) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(vars_annual), ~{
      x_raw <- as.numeric(.x)

      # 1) Anclas: valor anual SOLO en diciembre
      x <- x_raw
      x[month != 12] <- NA_real_

      # 2) Rellenar SOLO los diciembres faltantes usando última variación
      dec_idx <- which(month == 12)
      x_dec <- x[dec_idx]

      last_val <- NA_real_
      last_delta <- NA_real_

      for (i in seq_along(x_dec)) {
        if (!is.na(x_dec[i])) {
          if (!is.na(last_val)) {
            d <- x_dec[i] - last_val
            if (d != 0) last_delta <- d
          }
          last_val <- x_dec[i]
        } else if (!is.na(last_val)) {
          if (is.na(last_delta)) last_delta <- 0
          x_dec[i] <- last_val + last_delta
          last_val <- x_dec[i]
        }
      }

      x[dec_idx] <- x_dec

      # 3) Interpolación que pasa EXACTAMENTE por los puntos
      keep <- !is.na(x)
      if (sum(keep) >= 2) {
        tt <- t[keep]
        yy <- x[keep]
        pchip(tt, yy, t)
      } else {
        x
      }
    })
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-ym, -t, -month)

run_lags_levels_m <- function(var, L_max = 12){

  var_d <- paste0(var, "_d")

  map_dfr(1:L_max, function(L){

    d <- df_base_levels_m %>%
      arrange(country, year_month) %>%
      group_by(country) %>%
      mutate(
        dG    = G_Trends - lag(G_Trends),
        dN    = .data[[var]] - lag(.data[[var]]),
        p_lag = lag(dN, L)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      filter(
        !is.na(dG),
        !is.na(p_lag),
        !is.na(internet),
        !is.na(gini_disp),
        dG != 0,
        p_lag != 0
      )

    m <- feols(
      dG ~ p_lag + internet + gini_disp | country^year,
      data = d,
      cluster = ~country
    )

    ct <- summary(m)$coeftable

    tibble(
      variable = var,
      lag      = L,
      coef     = ct["p_lag", "Estimate"],
      p_value  = ct["p_lag", "Pr(>|t|)"],
      n        = nobs(m)
    )
  })
}

iv_vars <- c("HHI", "ENP", "Top1", "Top3", "Top5", "Entropy", "TailShare")

run_iv_lag <- function(variable, lag){

  purrr::map_dfr(iv_vars, function(iv){

    d <- df_base_levels_m %>%
      arrange(country, year_month) %>%
      group_by(country) %>%
      mutate(
        dG    = G_Trends - lag(G_Trends),
        dN    = .data[[variable]] - lag(.data[[variable]]),
        dIV   = .data[[iv]] - lag(.data[[iv]]),
        p_lag  = lag(dN,  lag),
        iv_lag = lag(dIV, lag)
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      filter(
        !is.na(dG),
        !is.na(p_lag),
        !is.na(iv_lag),
        dG != 0,
        p_lag != 0,
        iv_lag != 0
      )

    # First stage: ΔN_{t-L} ~ ΔIV_{t-L}
    fs <- feols(
      p_lag ~ iv_lag | country^year + year_month,
      data = d,
      cluster = ~country
    )

    f_excl <- tryCatch(
      wald(fs, "iv_lag")$stat,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )

    # Second stage: ΔG_t ~ ΔN̂_{t-L}
    ivm <- feols(
      dG ~ 1 | country^year + year_month | p_lag ~ iv_lag,
      data = d,
      cluster = ~country
    )

    ct <- summary(ivm)$coeftable

    tibble(
      variable      = variable,
      lag           = lag,
      instrument    = iv,
      F_first_stage = as.numeric(f_excl),
      coef_iv       = ct["fit_p_lag", "Estimate"],
      p_value       = ct["fit_p_lag", "Pr(>|t|)"],
      n             = nobs(ivm)
    )
  })
}
